title: Notification dated 20 Jun 1961
text: REGISTERED No. D. 221 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 169] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, JUNE 20, 1961/JYAISTHA 30, 1883 MINISTRY OF LAW (Legislative Department) NOTIFICATION New Delhi the 20th June, 1961 S-O. 1410.—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of section 1 of the Dowry Prohibition Act, 1961 (28 of 1961), the Central Government hereby appoints the 1st day of July, 1961, as the date on which the said Act shall come into force. [No. F. 14(7)/61-Leg. II.] S. P. SEN VARMA, Jt. Secy. ( 1005 ) PRINTED IN INDIA BY THE GENERAL MANAGER, GOVERNMENT OF INDIA PRESS, NEW DELHI AND PUBLISHED BY THE MANAGER OF PUBLICATIONS, DELHI, 1961 -- 1 of 2 -- -- 2 of 2 --
